---
title: "2019 CA Crashes"
format: dashboard
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| context: setup

library(tidyverse)     # ecosystem of data science packages
library(shiny)
library(leaflet)       # web interactive maps
library(sf)            # "simple features" (vector data for maps)
library(plotly)        # web interactive plots
library(ggiraph)       # make ggplots into interactive plots
library(RColorBrewer)  # optional: nice color schemes

crashes = read_csv("crashes_geospatial_2019.csv")
crashes = crashes |> mutate(COUNTY = str_remove(LOCATION, ".*,\\s*"))
```


# {.sidebar width="300px"}


```{r}
# input to select county
selectInput(
  inputId = "county",
  label = "County:",
  choices = sort(unique(str_to_title(crashes$COUNTY))),
  selected = "Alameda")
```

```{r}
# input to select violation (PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY)
selectInput(
  inputId = "pcf",
  label = "Primary Collision Factor:",
  choices = sort(unique(crashes$PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY)), 
  selected = "DUI")
```

```{r}
# input to choose type of collision (TYPE_OF_COLLISION)
checkboxGroupInput(
  inputId = "type",
  label = "Collision type:",
  choices = sort(unique(str_to_title(crashes$TYPE_OF_COLLISION))),
  selected = sort(unique(str_to_title(crashes$TYPE_OF_COLLISION))))
```

```{r}
# input to decide whether to color code by severity (COLLISION_SEVERITY)
radioButtons(
  inputId = "color",
  label = "Color by name?",
  choices = c("Yes", "No"),
  selected = "Yes")
```

```{r}
# input to choose date range
dateRangeInput(
  inputId = "dates",
  label = "Date range", 
  start = "2019-01-01",
  end = "2019-12-31"
)
```

```{r}
# input to change leaflet provider tiles
selectInput(
  inputId = "provider",
  label = "Select map provider:",
  choices = c(
    "CartoDB.Positron",
    "CartoDB.DarkMatter",
    "Esri.WorldTerrain",
    "Esri.WorldShadedRelief",
    "NASAGIBS.ViirsEarthAtNight2012",
    "USGS.USImageryTopo"), 
  selected = "CartoDB.Positron")
```



# Map

## Row

```{r}
# output: leaflet map
leafletOutput(outputId = "map")
```


# Collision Types

## Row

```{r}
# output(s) for tab-2
plotlyOutput(outputId = "plot")
```



```{r}
#| context: server

filtered_data = reactive({
  crashes %>%
    filter(
      str_to_title(COUNTY) == input$county,
      PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY == input$pcf,
      str_to_title(TYPE_OF_COLLISION) %in% input$type,
      DATETIME >= input$dates[1],
      DATETIME <= input$dates[2]
    )
})

# 2. Render the Leaflet Map (Tab 1)
output$map = renderLeaflet({
  pal = colorFactor(palette = "Set1", domain = crashes$COLLISION_SEVERITY)
  
  leaflet(data = filtered_data()) %>%
    addProviderTiles(input$provider) %>%
    addCircleMarkers(
      lng = ~POINT_X, 
      lat = ~POINT_Y,
      color = if(input$color == "Yes") ~pal(COLLISION_SEVERITY) else "blue",
      radius = 5,
      stroke = FALSE, 
      fillOpacity = 0.7,
      popup = ~paste("Severity:", COLLISION_SEVERITY, "<br>",
                     "Type:", TYPE_OF_COLLISION))
})


# assemble graphic for tab 2
output$plot = renderPlotly({
ggplotly(
  ggplot(filtered_data(), aes(x = TYPE_OF_COLLISION)) +
    geom_bar() + theme_minimal())
})
```
